intro: The weirdest, funniest, most addictive game of the year. Meet Deer and Munk, the goofiest duo you'll ever love. This wild adventure has to be played to be believed.
description:
WACKY! Deer & Munk Adventure is a 2D side-scrolling action adventure that's just as brilliant solo as it is in co-op. Play as Deer and Munk, two completely different characters whose wildly unique abilities make every stage feel like a fresh challenge. The art style is difficult to describe and impossible to forget. Rough around the edges, full of personality, and somehow utterly adorable. Rather like animated stickers that have wandered off the page. Once it gets its hooks into you, you won't be putting it down.

・Characters you won't find anywhere else. Deer and Munk look as though they've stumbled out of a doodle notebook and straight into your heart. Odd, charming, and completely addictive.
・Deer brings the brawn. Dash, high jump, shift heavy objects, and wield weapons. Munk brings the finesse. Double jump, glide, and squeeze through passages Deer could never manage.
・Neither character can succeed without the other. This is proper co-op, not just "player 2 tagging along."
・10 wonderfully distinct world maps and 200+ stages that never stop throwing something new your way.
・Unlock a new comic with its own unique story every time you clear a specific stage!
・Both solo play and co-op come with their own separate 
・A difficulty curve that grows alongside you, with varied environments and surprises to keep every session feeling fresh.
・Certain moments demand perfect timing. Press together, move together, think together. Friendships will be put to the test.
・Hundreds of unlockable costume pieces for heads, faces, outfits, and dances. Make your Deer and Munk entirely your own.
・Upgrade items at the shop and power your way through even the most challenging stages!
・200+ post-game challenges and hidden secrets. Finishing the story is only the beginning.
・Play on your telly, at the table, or on the move. TV Mode, Tabletop Mode, and Handheld Mode all fully supported.
・A soundtrack and sound design that brings the whole world to life.

Grab a friend, pick up a Joy-Con™, and dive into the most unexpectedly charming co-op adventure on Nintendo Switch™. Solo players, you're well catered for too. With 200+ stages packed with hidden secrets and surprises, there's always something new waiting. Think you can uncover everything? There's only one way to find out.

Prologue
On a peaceful autumn day, the acorn village was brimming with joy. Mountains of precious acorns had been gathered one by one over an entire year by every villager working side by side. They were far more than just food. They were hope for surviving the bitter winter ahead, a treasure filled with the sweat and smiles of every single neighbour.

But the joy did not last long. The Pig King's army came crashing in without warning, trampling everything in their path and carrying off every last acorn without mercy. When the dust settled, only despair and fear remained.

Then one small figure stood up. Munk was the tiniest one in the whole village, but no one had a braver heart. The tears on every neighbour's face made it impossible to stay still.

On the long road ahead, Munk finds an unexpected companion in Deer. Big, warm-hearted, and delightfully oblivious. The two clash constantly at first, but walking side by side, they both come to realise the same thing: neither one can do this without the other.

"Can't do it alone. Together, we absolutely can!"

The funny, goofy, and surprisingly heartwarming adventure of Deer and Munk begins right now!
